channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped mattress, 30th June
item.description:
This area is consistently used as a dumping ground. One more bag of rubbish has been dumped on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walnut Tree Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LARGE POT HOLE on the bend of main road and station road, 30th June
item.description:
Large pot hole, been there for MONTHS. needs fixing asap before it pops someone’s tyres. Pothole On the bend of main road and station road BR5 3EL
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive rubbish on Laburnum St, 30th June
item.description:
Rubbish has been accumulating along Laburnum St and side streets and collecting around the scaffolding surrounding the apartment buildings. Clothing, discarded cans and bottles, old food, cartons. It is hazardous to members of the community.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Laburnum Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence, 30th June
item.description:
Broken fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park bollards driven through, 30th June
item.description:
There was an accident A few weeks back where someone smashed through the jubilee park bollards whilst driving. They have since been put back by someone but are easily moveable and dangerous. Not safe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Yews Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 30th June
item.description:
A van drove past and threw a sink out of their van all over the road - we cleared the road and put on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish & bollards left by Bromley council lighting people, 30th June
item.description:
Recent works by council street light workers , been here for nearly 2 weeks.. needs collecting as blocking the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loud,loose drainage cover, 30th June
item.description:
Loud, loose drainage ironwork near this location. Every time a vehicle passes over it, it shifts and creates a sharp, loud, metallic clunking sound. This is causing significant sleep deprivation during the night and constitutes a severe noise nuisance. Needs urgent section 81 notice or tight packing/refitting to secure it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain grate has fallen in leaving a huge hole, 30th June
item.description:
This drain grid has collapsed leaving a hole large enough for a child to fall in, a car wheel to get stuck or a cyclist to have a serious accident. I have put some plastic buckets on it to make it visible but it is still very unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Freta Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised fire hydrant cover on pavement, 30th June
item.description:
There is a Thames water fire hydrant cover that has not been put back down properly , which could cause an accident. It is on the pavement opposite Dulwich Wood School.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyall Avenue, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest Bike left against railings 37 Cromwell Rd. SW7, 30th June
item.description:
This bike has been against our railings for over 24 hours

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Cromwell Road, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree ring barked, 30th June
item.description:
Someone has stripped all the bark off this poor tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in Norman park parking aea, 30th June
item.description:
Potholes have been here for months. Please canvass the whole parking area by the athletics entrance and fix the potholes!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: T, 30th June
item.description:
This has just been left after work compleated dangerous for cars coming into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edmund Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown tree and uneven path impossible to navigate with a 5 year old and double buggy daily!, 30th June
item.description:
The tree stump is over grown. Ground is so uneven making it impossibe for me to do school run twice a day with my double buggy without going in the road everyday twice a day!! Leaving my 5 year old to navigate poor floor with bumps and leaves to get around.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Days Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass bottles in the road from anti social behaviour, 30th June
item.description:
Glass bottles that will smash

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy pavement from bins and binbags, 30th June
item.description:
Bags and bins have leaked onto the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vomit in corridor, 30th June
item.description:
Vomit in corridor since 9am yesterday - report from yesterday afternoon now marked as resolved but hasn’t been cleaned and still smells- the cleaner is meant to mop the floor daily and it’s now been two days no cleaning.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mead Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This tree is dead, 30th June
item.description:
Branches have fallen onto a woman and a pram and onto parked cars this now a danger to the public This has been reported before but nothing has been done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish and litter, 30th June
item.description:
This area is a hot spot for fly tipping as it is the end of the quiet road. Today I saw a huge collection of rubbish bags left recently, as the fox haven't gotten into them yet and rip the bags open.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bracondale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
